docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,188.90 FILED BY MUBARAK, FARZANA AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED ASSOCIATES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-02-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
